cards.front: What is the primary purpose of recording both serial and parallel execution times?
cards.back: To compare the performance difference between a single CPU and multiple CPUs in a parallel computing environment
The time it takes for a single CPU to complete a task
The time it takes for multiple CPUs to complete a task together

cards.front: Why is it essential to record parallel execution times?
cards.back: To evaluate the effectiveness of parallel computing strategies and identify areas for optimization

cards.front: What is the advantage of comparing serial and parallel execution times?
cards.back: To understand the overhead of parallelization and determine the optimal number of CPUs for a given task
